healthScore.title: Health score profiles
healthScore.description: Score resources by configurable rules. The lowest score across the highest-priority matching profile becomes the resource's health score.
healthScore.label.name: Name
healthScore.empty.noRules: No rules. Add one to start scoring.
healthScore.empty.allResources: No filter set — matches all resources.
healthScore.confirm.delete: Delete this profile? Existing scores from this profile will also be removed.
healthScore.confirm.clearAllCaches: Clear hash for all rows so the next run re-scores everything?
healthScore.tip.delta: Negative reduces score, positive increases. Use -baseScore to zero out.
healthScore.tip.priority: Higher wins. Same priority falls back to lowest score.
healthScore.label.scoreTip: Health score: {{score}}. Click to see why.
healthScore.diagnosis.title: Health score breakdown
healthScore.diagnosis.empty: No profile has scored this resource yet.
predicate.MediaTypeFileCount.name: File type count
predicate.MediaTypeTotalSize.name: File type size
predicate.FileNamePatternCount.name: File name pattern count
predicate.HasCoverImage.name: Has cover image
predicate.FileSizeOutOfRange.name: File size out of range
predicate.RootDirectoryExists.name: Root directory exists
